text:
I updated the audio/xmradio from V 1.1 to V 1.2 (latest version).
	Since the program is really small, this is a rather easy fix that
	only requires the Makefile and distinfo gto be changed (everything
	else can stay the same, including the packaging list, as xmradio
	still installs the same two files it did in the previous version)
